patch:
--- lib/plugins/aws/provider.js
+++ lib/plugins/aws/provider.js
@@ -1360,6 +1360,7 @@
   const validRegions = [
     'us-east-1',
     'us-east-2',
     'us-gov-east-1',
+    'ca-west-1',
     'us-gov-west-1',
     'us-iso-east-1',
     'us-iso-west-1',
Note: The above patch adds the `ca-west-1` region to the list of valid regions in the `provider.js` file.
